snapshot.title: Add second story arc (chapters 6–10) for all 4 characters
snapshot.description: Each character currently has 5 chapters. Once a user completes all 5, the storyline clamps to the last chapter. This task adds a second 5-chapter arc for each character, continuing their story. Related: @doc/specs/characters-storylines
